heading: Why book your diving trip through us

cards.title: Certification verified, always
cards.text: We confirm your certification level before matching you to a center — and confirm the center's licensing before recommending them to you.

cards.title: Matched to your dates, not just your budget
cards.text: Manta and whale shark sightings are seasonal and site-specific — we won't sell you a trip timed wrong for what you're hoping to see.

cards.title: Resort or guesthouse, your choice
cards.text: Good diving isn't only at luxury resorts — several guesthouse islands sit right next to strong dive sites at a fraction of the cost.
